articles.title: 'Drishyam 3' advance booking: Mohanlal film touches Rs 1.80 cr
articles.description: Anticipation for 'Drishyam 3' is soaring as advance bookings have already surpassed Rs 1.80 crore worldwide, with expectations to cross Rs 2 crore soon. The highly awaited crime thriller, starring Mohanlal and directed by Jeethu Joseph, continues Georgekutty's family saga. The recently released trailer hints at lingering doubts and an ongoing search for truth, promising another gripping installment.

articles.title: Seven ‘The Devil Wears Prada’ quotes that live rent-free in our minds
articles.description: Twenty years after its debut, 'The Devil Wears Prada' continues to resonate with iconic quotes. The films, including their sequel, delivered memorable lines from Miranda Priestly and Nigel that defined workplace dynamics and fashion commentary. Emily Charlton also made a strong return with sharp, fearless pronouncements.

The film, depicting Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's life, has garnered significant attention. With strong performances and a compelling narrative, it has achieved a total India net collection of Rs 61.45 crore, with Day 9 earnings reaching Rs 5.60 crore. Read on to know more in detail.

The comments, made in front of fellow streamers and his girlfriend Aliday Alter, drew criticism online. The couple later revealed they are expecting a boy.

Their outfits were coordinated and stylish. Swift wore dresses and blazers. Kelce wore smart jackets and trousers. Their pre-wedding moments are being closely watched. The wedding is scheduled for July in New York City.

articles.title: Pokimane reveals D4vd headlines have been giving her nightmares because he once visited her home
articles.description: Popular streamer Pokimane expressed deep distress over shocking allegations against singer D4vd, whom she knew personally and had hosted at her home. D4vd, real name David Anthony Burke, faces severe charges including murder and child abuse following the discovery of a missing teen's remains. This revelation has left many, including Pokimane, re-evaluating online relationships.

articles.title: Hidden Harbour At Ancient Olympia: Imaging uncovers buried basin and floodwall; study recasts ancient travel
articles.description: Ancient Olympia, birthplace of the Olympic Games, was more than just ruins; new research reveals a sophisticated waterway system. Advanced technology uncovered a massive harbour basin, suggesting visitors arrived by boat directly to the sanctuary. This discovery challenges previous beliefs about ancient travel logistics and highlights the site's advanced urban planning, including flood defenses.

The show continues to captivate audiences with its gripping storyline and relatable characters.

articles.title: Mother's Day special: 5 types of moms - Which one is yours?
articles.description: As kids, we don’t sit around analysing our moms like characters in a psychology book. We just live with them, fight with them, and eventually, slowly, start connecting the dots. At some point, you realise that your childhood wasn’t random—it was shaped by the kind of mother you had. Types of parenting styles might sound like neat labels from a textbook, but in real life, they feel more like memories, habits, and those weird little patterns that suddenly make sense.As we celebrate Mother’s Day on May 10 this year, this soft reflection is perfect for celebrating not just “mom,” but the unique type of mother you grew up with.

articles.title: Nandamuri Balakrishna and Koratala Siva’s ‘NBK112’ is now called ‘Carpenter’ - Report
articles.description: Nandamuri Balakrishna and director Koratala Siva are reportedly naming their upcoming mass action drama 'Carpenter'. The film, expected to have pan-India appeal, is slated for a pooja ceremony on May 21. Star composer Anirudh Ravichander will score the music, and Vidya Balan is rumored to be the leading lady.

articles.title: ‘The Devil Wears Prada 3’ happening? Director David Frankel says ‘Never say never again’
articles.description: Director David Frankel is open to a third 'The Devil Wears Prada' film, expressing a desire to reunite with the beloved cast. Following the sequel's success, Frankel admitted he never anticipated a second installment but wouldn't rule out another. He highlighted the careful inclusion of nostalgic callbacks from the original, aiming to delight fans without overwhelming them.

articles.title: Penny Lancaster shares secret of 26 years of relationship with Rod Stewart; Jokes ‘I deserve a medal, don’t I?’
articles.description: Penny Lancaster and her rock star husband Rod Stewart have mastered the art of lasting love over their 18 years of marriage. Their secret? A commitment to each other through regular date nights, infectious laughter, and the joy of celebrating special moments like their enchanting anniversary getaways.
